text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 260 

SSI_IND 

LABEL: Supplemental Security Income (SSI) Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating if the beneficiary receives Supplemental Security Income (SSI) administered via the 
Social Security Administration (SSA); most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: SSI_IND 

LONG NAME: SSI_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base
